name: Scientific Review Writer - Neuroplasticity in Adult Brain

inputs.research_topic: Adult Neuroplasticity Mechanisms and Therapeutic Interventions
inputs.keywords: adult neurogenesis, synaptic plasticity, neuroplasticity, brain-derived neurotrophic factor (BDNF), long-term potentiation (LTP), dendritic spine dynamics, myelin plasticity, cognitive training, physical exercise, environmental enrichment, learning and memory
inputs.additional_information: Manuscript structure preferences: Target journal: Nature Reviews Neuroscience (10,000-12,000 words). Structure: (1) Introduction setting context of adult brain plasticity paradigm shift, (2) Molecular mechanisms section covering BDNF signaling, synaptic remodeling, epigenetic regulation, (3) Cellular mechanisms including adult neurogenesis in hippocampus/olfactory bulb, glia-neuron interactions, myelin remodeling, (4) Systems-level plasticity covering network reorganization and critical periods, (5) Interventions section analyzing cognitive training, exercise, pharmacological enhancers, brain stimulation techniques, (6) Clinical implications for stroke recovery, neurodegenerative diseases, aging, (7) Future directions and controversies. Aim for 2500+ word manuscript with comprehensive citations, critical appraisal of evidence quality, identification of conflicting findings, and synthesis of current consensus vs open questions.
